meta.title: AoE2.ai | AI Tools for Age of Empires II Players
meta.description: Scout opponents, analyze matchups, understand your replays, and turn game knowledge into practical decisions fast.
meta.og_description: Your AI advantage for Age of Empires II

footer.no_ads: No ads, no data selling — just tools that help you play better.

home.hero_subtitle: Scout opponents, analyze matchups, understand your replays, and turn game knowledge into practical decisions fast.
home.quick_agent_desc: Fast help for civ matchups, unit counters, strategies and build order ideas.
home.quick_scout_desc: Check an opponent, the civ matchup and map plan before or during a ranked game.
home.quick_replay_desc: Turn a replay into an AI battle chronicle with key timings, swings and mistakes.
home.tool_agent_desc: Your AI-powered AoE2 assistant. Ask about matchups, strategies, unit counters, build orders — with real-time tool access to game data.
home.tool_replay_desc: Upload a .aoe2record file and get an AI-generated chronicle of the match with battle detection, army composition analysis, and tactical insights.
home.tool_techtree_desc: Browse all civilizations with their bonuses, unique units, and technologies. Compare two civs side-by-side to plan your strategy.
home.tool_players_desc: Browse the official leaderboard or look up any player by profile ID. View ELO, recent matches with civ picks, rating changes, and win rates.
home.tool_tournaments_desc: Live results, brackets, and schedules from the biggest AoE2 tournaments. Follow Red Bull Wololo, T90 Titans League, and more.
home.tool_live_desc: Search any opponent before your match. Analyze their civ preferences, win rates, recent form, and get AI-powered tactical recommendations.
home.tool_learn_desc: Master essential build orders with interactive step-by-step guides and a built-in practice timer. From beginner scouts to advanced tower rushes.

agent.title: The Definitive AoE2 Agent
agent.subtitle: Ask anything about Age of Empires 2. I'll use real game data to help you.
agent.placeholder: Ask about matchups, counters, build orders...
agent.error_response: Sorry, I couldn't generate a response.

replay.title: Replay Analyzer
replay.subtitle: Upload a .aoe2record file for AI-powered match chronicle, battle detection, and deep stats
replay.drop_text: Drop your .aoe2record file here or click to browse
replay.analyzing: Parsing replay file and analyzing game data...
replay.map_control_desc: Map presence in enemy territory over time — taller = more aggressive map control

players.title: Player Leaderboard
players.subtitle: Official AoE2 DE ranked leaderboards with {count} active players. Search any player or browse the rankings.
players.subtitle_fallback: Official AoE2 DE ranked leaderboards with thousands of active players. Search any player or browse the rankings.
players.type_to_search: Type at least 3 characters to search
players.no_results: No results found. Try a different name.

techtree.title: Tech Tree Explorer
techtree.subtitle: Complete civilization data with units, technologies, and buildings. Compare any two civs side by side.
techtree.select_civ: Select a civilization to view its full tech tree

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.subtitle: Schedules, prize pools, and brackets from top AoE2 competitive events. Data sourced from Liquipedia.
tournaments.no_tournaments: No tournaments found for this filter.

live.title: Opponent Scout
live.subtitle: Search any player to analyze their civ preferences, recent form, and get tactical recommendations before your match.
live.no_results: No players found. Try a different name.
live.ai_unavailable: AI analysis is available when an OpenAI API key is configured. The scouting data above is already useful on its own.

learn.title: Build Order Library
learn.subtitle: Master the essential build orders for every map and playstyle. Interactive step-by-step guides with built-in practice timer.

login.title: Sign in to AoE2.ai
login.subtitle: Save your favorite players, civilizations, and build orders across sessions.
login.no_providers: No login providers configured yet. Check back soon.
